activities.title: Build WS Request Payload
activities.description: Construct ResponseCreateWsRequest: model, instructions, input[], tools[], tool_choice, parallel_tool_calls, reasoning, store, include, service_tier, prompt_cache_key, text, generate, client_metadata. Serialize with type:'response.create' tag. Strip stream/background fields

activities.title: Prepare Incremental Request
activities.description: get_incremental_items(): compare current request with last_request. Check non-input fields match. Verify current input starts with (last input + server-returned items). If valid: return delta items + previous_response_id. If empty delta and !allow_empty_delta: return None (full request)

activities.title: Send Request Frame
activities.description: Serialize ResponsesWsRequest to JSON, send as Message::Text via WsStream.send(). Record telemetry: on_ws_request(duration, error, connection_reused)

activities.title: Stream Response Loop
activities.description: run_websocket_response_stream(): loop receiving frames with idle timeout. For each Text frame: check WrappedWebsocketErrorEvent first, then parse ResponsesStreamEvent, handle codex.rate_limits, track server model, call process_responses_event(). Break on Completed. Error on Close/Binary/timeout

activities.title: Return Synthetic SSE Response
Track Last Response
activities.description: map_response_stream(): spawn task that accumulates OutputItemDone items and captures response_id from Completed event. Send LastResponse{response_id, items_added} via oneshot for next turn's incremental detection
